capabilities.label: Single white-body list workspace
forbiddenPatterns: hand-written PageHeader + Search + Table + Pagination
multiple white cards around one list workspace
generic main/body container names in contract

capabilities.label: Page header + form body + sticky footer
forbiddenPatterns: Card + Form + footer
Layout.footer for edit actions
independent white card wrappers per section

capabilities.label: Single white-body stat/search/table workspace
forbiddenPatterns: hand-written PageHeader + Search + Table + Pagination
stat/search/table split across multiple white cards
fixed-column config declared only inside columns

capabilities.label: Split workspace with left tree and right list
forbiddenPatterns: split left tree and right list into independent pages
second outer scroll owner outside the split workspace
collapse split regions into one generic main body

capabilities.label: Drawer shell with body and footer
forbiddenPatterns: free-floating modal body without one drawer shell
move drawer footer actions into body content
replace drawer shell with generic page container

capabilities.label: Page header + detail body
forbiddenPatterns: custom detail grid without detail semantics
multiple white cards around one detail workspace
generic content/body contract regions

capabilities.label: Page header + feedback panel workspace
forbiddenPatterns: reuse list or form shells for feedback pages
multiple working surfaces around one feedback panel
collapse feedback panel into generic empty div
